---
title: 'Character Sketch: Theron Ashlund'
date: '2014-10-26T07:07:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '6194377656346094370'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
  - 'Character Sketch'
---

<br /><br />Character Sketch Template (<a href="https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/" target="_blank">Hints</a>)<br /><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />Photos: </div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leather-jacket-082d10ab7ab3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leather-jacket-082d10ab7ab3.jpg" height="320" width="238" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /><a href="http://www.pinterest.com/pin/471048442249349638/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img alt="" border="0" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiBD0Z9TKpmKisvJOsMWZHtkPOjtMCTZbGOOyE2MvG8qmoRORYAHj8FgOH2PIPQiwrNRDNf-2FeihAHlTbrWgiOUigoIQMhsGaZnFn5GLuAMMu1chLMNhCg92SrTocMfX0CpvkpZP0Fr7KK/s1600/it's%2Bnot%2Bscience%2Bfiction.jpg" height="320" width="214" /></a></div><br /><br /></div><br /><h3><br />Theron Ashlund</h3><br /><h4><br />Captain Theron "Ash" Ashlund, USAF Spec Ops. </h4><br /><h4><br /></h4><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />Overview: <a href="http://www.fiction-writers-mentor.com/list-of-character-traits.html" target="_blank">Traits</a>, <a href="http://www.strengthstest.com/strengthsfinderthemes/strengths-themes.html" target="_blank">Strengths</a>, <a href="http://www.strengthdeployment.com/" target="_blank">SDI</a>, <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/personality-types" target="_blank">Type</a>, <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/articles/our-theory" target="_blank">TypeTheory</a>, Gifts, Talents, Skills</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br /><br /><br />Introvert, obServant, Thinker, Prospector, (<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/istp-personality" target="_blank">ISTP</a>) | </div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />I. Physical Description</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />A. Hair</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. Brown Hair, High &amp; Tight, slightly longer on top.&nbsp;</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />B. Eyes</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1.Brown,&nbsp;20/10&nbsp;better than perfect&nbsp;vision, <br /><br />C. Height/Weight</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. 170 lbs, fit, works out daily out of habit from special forces training.&nbsp;</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />D. Style of Dress</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. When a civilian, he wears blue or black jeans, white or black t-shirts, and a black leather jacket. Also wears black fedora, and dark sunglassess that hide his eyes, even at dusk. </div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. When in military settings he wears combat or military dress uniforms.</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />3. When in the Experiment, wears a white, tight, jump suit. </div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />E. Speech</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. ?????</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. certain words or phrases??</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />F. How Character Feels About Physical Appearance</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. Innocuous, blend in to the crowd, disappear, but look a little cool while doing it. </div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. His ways are set, until he is forced into hiding, when he must make changes to his look. </div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />II. Personality</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />A. Mannerisms?</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. certain little thing the character likes to do, like tearing up napkins while waiting for food at a restaurant</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. another certain little thing the character likes to do</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />B. Bad Habits</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. Bad Habit 1</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. Bad Habit 2</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />C. <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/istp-strengths-and-weaknesses" target="_blank">Strengths/Weaknesses</a></div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. Optimistic, Energetic, Relaxed, Good in Crises, Both spontaneous and rational. </div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. Stubborn, Private, Reserved, Insensitive, Too Many Risks, Bored Easily</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />III. Likes/Dislikes</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />A. Likes</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. Like 1</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. Like 2</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />B. Dislikes</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. Dislike 1</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. Dislike 2</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />IV. Family</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />A. Parents</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. mom</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. dad</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />B. Siblings</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. sibling 1</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. sibling 2</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />C. Extended Family</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. extended family member 1</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. extended family member 2</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />V. Hobbies</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />A. Hobby 1</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. details about hobby</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. characterâ€™s feelings about hobby</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />B. Hobby 2</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. details about hobby</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. characterâ€™s feelings about hobby</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />VI. History</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />A. Childhood</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />3. characterâ€™s feelings about childhood</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />B. Teen Years</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />3. characterâ€™s feelings about teen years</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />C. Young Adulthood</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />3. characterâ€™s feelings about young adulthood</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />D. Just Before the Story Begins</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />1. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />2. event</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 90px;"><br />3. characterâ€™s feelings about events</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 30px;"><br />VII. Conflicts</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />A. Inner Conflicts</div><br /><div style="padding-left: 60px;"><br />B. Outer Conflicts</div><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /><a href="http://www.examiner.com/article/the-scarlet-beret-the-road-less-taken" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/air-drop-2-34b3815a2cf6.jpg" height="208" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /><a href="http://www.pinterest.com/PJBlue12/military/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/air-drop-7408f9ec39fd.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /><a href="http://www.americanspecialops.com/usaf-special-operations/combat-controllers/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/combat-controllers-11c986dcc9d5.jpg" height="213" width="320" /></a></div><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /><a href="http://christi-snow.com/when-the-mission-ends-trilogy/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/usaf-34735bf50ad6.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /><a href="https://josephmallozzi.wordpress.com/2014/06/" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spock-3d-chess-58af7def7e85.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />******<br /><br /><br /><br />Thank you for reading. I hope you enjoyed this. I'd love to make a community with this project. If you would like to add, comment on, critique, or otherwise participate... that would be great!<br /><br /><br /><br />Please include any information about yourself, your blog/wesbite/amazon author page that you want to share with the community also.<br /><br /><br /><br /><i>* I may include "Affiliate Links" which means I earn a commission when you buy products I link to. To see my full about page and disclosures: <a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/what-is-this.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a></i><br /><br /><br /><br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">It's Author Fun</a>&nbsp;By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br /><br /><br />To Subscribe to the <a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br />For Non-Fiction writing by <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />
